steps.name: Click getByTestId('inventory-item').filter({ has: getByTestId('inventory-item-name').filter({ hasText: 'Sauce Labs Bolt T-Shirt' }) }).getByRole('button', { name: 'Add to cart' })
Expect "toBeVisible" getByTestId('inventory-item').filter({ has: getByTestId('inventory-item-name').filter({ hasText: 'Sauce Labs Bolt T-Shirt' }) }).getByRole('button', { name: 'Remove' })
Finish purchase
